decisions.decision: Treat this leaf as production-plus-tests if the current branch still lacks the step-3 replay helper and `unrealizedPnl` serializer seam in `backend/server.py`; do not assume a later rebase will supply that prerequisite before the representative `/positions` P&L regressions are implemented.
alternatives_rejected: Write tests only against the current four-field `/positions` payload and wait for another branch to make them pass.
Defer the representative P&L regressions entirely until some future integration sweep.

decisions.decision: Keep the new weighted-average, partial-close, and sign-flip regressions in `BayesMarketExposureProjectionTests`, asserting them primarily through the getter or projection seam while relying on the existing baseline `/positions` coverage for route parity instead of adding HTTP reads for every scenario.
alternatives_rejected: Drive every representative replay-math scenario through `route_request("GET", "/v1/accounts/{id}/positions")`.
Move the new cases into a separate helper-only cluster and stop checking public serialization parity nearby.

decisions.decision: Build the three representative survivor fixtures mostly from accepted `POST /v1/markets/{id}/orders/event-trade` writes so the tests inherit canonical fill pricing, order shape, and exposure syncing, using direct `ORDERS` or `ACCOUNT_EXPOSURE` seeding only if a setup cannot be expressed cleanly through the public write path.
alternatives_rejected: Seed all representative P&L scenarios directly in storage and give up the accepted EventTrade flow.
Force the public write path even for awkward fixtures where direct seeding would be clearer and more deterministic.

decisions.decision: Patch `query_market_atomic_probability_for_inference(...)` to fixed marks in the new regressions and keep their assertions focused on exact survivor `unrealizedPnl` plus targeted survivor invariants, rather than duplicating the full ordered `/positions` payload and row-shape assertions already frozen by the baseline contract test.
alternatives_rejected: Depend on live inference outputs and assert only relative P&L behavior.
Reassert the entire ordered `/positions` payload in every representative P&L case.

decisions.decision: Add explicit companion assertions for the surviving signed `netSize` in the partial-close and sign-flip regressions, because exact `unrealizedPnl` alone is not sufficient to prove the correct survivor identity and replay result.
alternatives_rejected: Assert only exact `unrealizedPnl` and assume the survivor size is implied.
Push signed survivor-size coverage back onto the older baseline `/positions` contract tests.

decisions.decision: Model the sign-flip survivor using the signed formula `(mark - averageCost) * netSize`, with the opposite-sign remainder resetting basis to the crossing fill price so profitable shorts remain positive when the patched mark is below that new basis.
alternatives_rejected: Carry the pre-flip basis forward into the opposite-sign survivor.
Use a sign convention that makes profitable short survivors report negative `unrealizedPnl`.

steps.task: Audit the current branch for the missing step-3 replay helper and `/positions` `unrealizedPnl` production seam in `backend/server.py`, and if it is still absent, land or rebase that prerequisite before expecting the new exact P&L regressions to pass.

Extend `tests/test_bayes_market_api.py` inside `BayesMarketExposureProjectionTests` with a representative multi-fill weighted-average survivor case built mostly from accepted EventTrade writes, patch the mark-query seam to a fixed value, and assert the exact resulting `unrealizedPnl` for the accumulated same-sign position.

Add a representative partial-close survivor regression built mostly from accepted EventTrade writes, patch the mark-query seam, and assert both the surviving signed `netSize` and the exact `unrealizedPnl` implied by preserving the pre-close weighted-average basis on the same-sign remainder.

Add a representative sign-flip survivor regression built mostly from accepted EventTrade writes, patch the mark-query seam, and assert both the surviving signed `netSize` and the exact account-perspective `unrealizedPnl` produced when the opposite-sign remainder resets basis to the crossing fill price.

Run the focused `tests/test_bayes_market_api.py::BayesMarketExposureProjectionTests` selection covering the new weighted-average, partial-close, and sign-flip survivor cases, fix any failures until the representative `/positions` P&L regressions pass cleanly, and then stage and commit the leaf.
